meta.title: What is a hypersonic boost glide vehicle?
meta.description:
The only types of hypersonic weapons in service today are hypersonic boost-glide vehicles, or HGVs. Here's what they are, and what makes them so tough to shoot down.
#shorts #airpower #hypersonic #hypersonicmissile #hypersonicmissiles #defense
